description: Binary pass/fail criteria for SEO page score optimization loop

criteria.name: title_tag_optimized
criteria.description: Title tag is 50-60 characters, includes primary keyword, front-loaded

criteria.name: meta_description_present
criteria.description: Meta description is 150-160 chars, compelling, includes keyword

criteria.name: heading_hierarchy_valid
criteria.description: Exactly one H1, H2-H6 follow logical hierarchy with no skipped levels

criteria.name: schema_markup_present
criteria.description: At least one JSON-LD schema block present and valid

criteria.name: og_tags_complete
criteria.description: Open Graph tags present: og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url
criteria.check: og_title AND og_description AND og_image AND og_url

criteria.name: images_have_alt_text
criteria.description: All images have descriptive alt text

criteria.name: keyword_density_natural
criteria.description: Primary keyword density between 1-3%, no stuffing

criteria.name: internal_links_sufficient
criteria.description: At least 3 internal links with descriptive anchor text

criteria.name: no_category_regression
criteria.description: No SEO score category drops below baseline value
